query:
SELECT at.id, at.status, at.decision, ai.status as instanceStatus, r.requestNumber 
FROM approvalTasks at 
JOIN approvalInstances ai ON at.instanceId = ai.id 
JOIN requests r ON ai.requestId = r.id 
WHERE r.requestNumber LIKE '%SS0020%' 
ORDER BY at.id DESC LIMIT 10;
